summary: Read-only plan for cluster gitcrawl-449-plan-wave-20260615-a. The two job candidates, #92452 and #92516, are both marked security-sensitive in the hydrated preflight artifact because they involve keyed-store trust/provenance and plugin capability boundaries, so they should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling rather than closed or merged by Clownfish. Hydrated linked #76433 is also security-sensitive and should be routed. Non-security linked #90071 is related but distinct and should remain open outside this cluster's closure path. Closed PR #1 is historical context only.
